name: ExtensionNutritionProduct_Status
title: R5: active | inactive | entered-in-error (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `NutritionProduct.status` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`NutritionProduct.status` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `NutritionProduct.status` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `NutritionProduct.status` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `NutritionProduct` is not mapped.
Element `NutritionProduct.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `NutritionProduct.status` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `NutritionProduct` is not mapped.
Element `NutritionProduct.status` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Unknown does not represent "other" - one of the defined statuses must apply.  Unknown is used when the authoring system is not sure what the current status is.
element.isModifierReason: This element is labelled as a modifier because it is a status element that contains status entered-in-error which means that the resource should not be treated as valid

element.definition: The current state of the product.
element.comment: Unknown does not represent "other" - one of the defined statuses must apply.  Unknown is used when the authoring system is not sure what the current status is.

binding.description: Codes identifying the lifecycle stage of a product.
